PCH Median Improvements Project ¾ Updates:  The project was approved by the Planning Commission on September 8, 2021. This project requires Caltrans approval since the work will be on  Pacific  Coast  Highway.  The  project  reports  and  plans  are  being routed through Caltrans for final approval. Vehicle Protection Devices ¾ Project Description:  Per Malibu Municipal Code Section 17.48.070 requires vehicle impact protection devices to be installed for all parking spaces located adjacent  to  any  outdoor  pedestrian  seating  area.    There  are  two  locations within the City’s right-of-way  and City-owned property that would require a vehicle impact protection device.
Malibu Bluffs Park South Walkway ¾ Project Description:  This project will include replacing the existing sidewalk located on the south side of Malibu Bluffs Park.
